original: King Juan Carlos of Spain once insisted “kings don’t abdicate, they die in their sleep”.
translation_literal: 西班牙国王胡安·卡洛斯曾经坚称：“国王们不会退位，他们在睡梦中死去。”

chunks.chinese: 西班牙国王胡安·卡洛斯

chunks.relation: 修饰主语，说明国王所属国家
修饰谓语，说明动作发生时间

chunks.english: “kings don’t abdicate, they die in their sleep”
chunks.chinese: “国王们不会退位，他们在睡梦中死去”
chunks.relation: 作谓语 insisted 的宾语内容
构成直接引语中的第一分句
与前一分句并列

original: But embarrassing scandals and the popularity of the republican left in the recent Euro-elections have forced him to eat his words and stand down.
translation_literal: 但是，令人尴尬的丑闻以及共和派左翼在最近欧洲议会选举中的受欢迎程度，已经迫使他收回自己的话并退位。

chunks.relation: 连接前后句，表示转折

chunks.english: embarrassing scandals and the popularity of the republican left in the recent Euro-elections
chunks.chinese: 令人尴尬的丑闻以及共和派左翼在最近欧洲议会选举中的受欢迎程度

chunks.relation: 修饰 scandals

chunks.english: the popularity of the republican left in the recent Euro-elections
chunks.chinese: 共和派左翼在最近欧洲议会选举中的受欢迎程度
chunks.relation: 与 scandals 并列，共同构成主语
修饰 popularity，说明是谁的受欢迎程度

chunks.chinese: 在最近欧洲议会选举中的
chunks.relation: 修饰 popularity，说明范围
作谓语 have forced 的宾语

chunks.english: to eat his words and stand down
chunks.relation: 补充说明宾语 him 被迫做的动作

key_words.meaning: 共和派的，支持共和制的

key_phrases.meaning: 收回前言，承认自己说错了

original: So, does the Spanish crisis suggest that monarchy is seeing its last days?
translation_literal: 那么，西班牙危机是否表明君主制正在走向它的末日？

chunks.relation: 承接上文，引出问题
疑问句中的谓语结构

chunks.english: that monarchy is seeing its last days
chunks.chinese: 君主制正在走向它的末日
chunks.relation: 作谓语 suggest 的宾语
作从句谓语 is seeing 的宾语

original: Does that mean the writing is on the wall for all European royals, with their magnificent uniforms and majestic lifestyles?
translation_literal: 那是否意味着，对所有拥有华丽制服和威严生活方式的欧洲王室成员来说，大势已去的预兆已经出现了？

chunks.relation: 疑问句中的谓语结构

chunks.english: the writing is on the wall for all European royals
chunks.chinese: 对所有欧洲王室成员来说，大势已去的预兆已经出现了
chunks.relation: 作谓语 mean 的宾语内容
作系动词 is 后的表语

chunks.chinese: 对于所有欧洲王室成员来说
chunks.relation: 说明预兆针对的对象

chunks.english: with their magnificent uniforms and majestic lifestyles
chunks.chinese: 拥有华丽制服和威严生活方式的
chunks.relation: 补充修饰 all European royals

key_phrases.phrase: the writing is on the wall
key_phrases.meaning: 大势已去，厄运将至的迹象已经很明显

original: The Spanish case provides arguments both for and against monarchy.
translation_literal: 西班牙案例提供了支持和反对君主制两方面的论据。

chunks.relation: 作谓语 provides 的宾语

chunks.chinese: 支持和反对君主制两方面的
chunks.relation: 修饰 arguments，说明论据的两种方向

original: When public opinion is particularly polarised, as it was following the end of the Franco regime, monarchs can rise above “mere” politics and “embody” a spirit of national unity.
translation_literal: 当公众舆论特别两极分化时，正如它在佛朗哥政权结束之后那样，君主们能够超越“纯粹的”政治，并“体现”一种民族团结的精神。

chunks.english: When public opinion is particularly polarised
chunks.chinese: 当公众舆论特别两极分化时
chunks.relation: 修饰主句，说明背景条件

chunks.english: as it was following the end of the Franco regime
chunks.chinese: 正如它在佛朗哥政权结束之后那样
chunks.relation: 补充说明公众舆论两极分化的历史背景

chunks.english: following the end of the Franco regime
chunks.chinese: 在佛朗哥政权结束之后
chunks.relation: 说明插入语中的时间背景
作谓语 can rise above 的宾语
与 can rise above 并列，共同说明 monarchs 的动作
作 embody 的宾语
修饰 spirit，说明精神的内容

sentence_patterns.explanation: as it was following the end of the Franco regime 是插入式 as 结构，用来补充说明前面 public opinion is particularly polarised 的历史背景。

original: It is this apparent transcendence of politics that explains monarchs’ continuing popularity as heads of state.
translation_literal: 正是这种表面上的对政治的超越，解释了君主们作为国家元首的持续受欢迎。

chunks.english: It is this apparent transcendence of politics that
chunks.chinese: 正是这种表面上的对政治的超越
chunks.relation: 强调句结构，强调真正主语

chunks.chinese: 这种表面上的对政治的超越
chunks.relation: 被强调的主语
修饰 transcendence，说明超越的对象
作谓语 explains 的宾语
说明君主受欢迎时的身份

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is/was + 被强调部分 + that/who + 其他部分
sentence_patterns.explanation: 本句用 It is...that... 强调 this apparent transcendence of politics，真正主干是 this apparent transcendence of politics explains...。

original: And so, the Middle East excepted, Europe is the most monarch-infested region in the world, with 10 kingdoms (not counting Vatican City and Andorra).
translation_literal: 因此，除中东外，欧洲是世界上君主制最密集的地区，拥有10个王国（不包括梵蒂冈城和安道尔）。

chunks.relation: 承接前文，引出结果
限定比较范围

chunks.english: the most monarch-infested region in the world
chunks.chinese: 世界上君主制最密集的地区
chunks.relation: 作系动词 is 后的表语
限定 region 的范围
补充说明欧洲君主制密集的表现

chunks.english: not counting Vatican City and Andorra
chunks.chinese: 不包括梵蒂冈城和安道尔
chunks.relation: 补充说明计数范围

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语前后插入补充限定成分
sentence_patterns.explanation: the Middle East excepted 和 not counting Vatican City and Andorra 都是补充限定信息，阅读时应先抓住 Europe is the most monarch-infested region 这个主干。
the Middle East excepted 相当于 with the Middle East excepted，表示“除中东外”。

key_words.meaning: 君主制密集的，充满君主制的

original: But unlike their absolutist counterparts in the Gulf and Asia, most royal families have survived because they allow voters to avoid the difficult search for a non-controversial but respected public figure.
translation_literal: 但是，不同于他们在海湾地区和亚洲的专制君主同行，大多数王室家族已经存续下来，因为他们允许选民避免对一个无争议但受尊敬的公众人物的艰难寻找。

chunks.relation: 连接前后句，表示转折

chunks.english: unlike their absolutist counterparts in the Gulf and Asia
chunks.chinese: 不同于他们在海湾地区和亚洲的专制君主同行
chunks.relation: 说明比较对象
修饰 counterparts，说明所在地区

chunks.english: because they allow voters to avoid the difficult search for a non-controversial but respected public figure
chunks.chinese: 因为他们允许选民避免对一个无争议但受尊敬的公众人物的艰难寻找
chunks.relation: 说明大多数王室家族存续下来的原因
作 allow 的宾语

chunks.english: to avoid the difficult search for a non-controversial but respected public figure
chunks.chinese: 避免对一个无争议但受尊敬的公众人物的艰难寻找
chunks.relation: 补充说明 voters 被允许做的事

chunks.english: for a non-controversial but respected public figure
chunks.chinese: 对一个无争议但受尊敬的公众人物的
chunks.relation: 修饰 search，说明寻找的对象

key_words.meaning: 专制主义的，绝对君主制的

original: Even so, kings and queens undoubtedly have a downside.
translation_literal: 即便如此，国王和女王无疑有一个缺点。

chunks.relation: 承接上文并表示让步转折
修饰谓语，表示确定性
作谓语 have 的宾语

original: Symbolic of national unity as they claim to be, their very history — and sometimes the way they behave today — embodies outdated and indefensible privileges and inequalities.
translation_literal: 尽管他们声称自己象征着民族团结，他们的自身历史，以及有时他们今天的行为方式，却体现了过时的且不可辩护的特权和不平等。

chunks.english: Symbolic of national unity as they claim to be
chunks.chinese: 尽管他们声称自己象征着民族团结
chunks.relation: 修饰主句，表示让步
修饰 symbolic，说明象征的内容

chunks.english: and sometimes the way they behave today
chunks.chinese: 以及有时他们今天的行为方式
chunks.relation: 补充增加另一个主语内容
修饰 the way，说明行为方式

chunks.english: outdated and indefensible privileges and inequalities
chunks.chinese: 过时的且不可辩护的特权和不平等
chunks.relation: 作谓语 embodies 的宾语
修饰 privileges and inequalities

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: adj./n./adv. + as + 主语 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: Symbolic of national unity as they claim to be 是让步倒装，意思是“尽管他们声称自己象征民族团结”。
and sometimes the way they behave today 被破折号隔开，补充增加主语内容，主干是 their very history embodies...。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: adj. + as + 主语 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: as 在这里引导让步结构，不表示普通的“因为”或“当……时”。

key_words.meaning: 不可辩护的，站不住脚的

original: At a time when Thomas Piketty and other economists are warning of rising inequality and the increasing power of inherited wealth, it is bizarre that wealthy aristocratic families should still be the symbolic heart of modern democratic states.
translation_literal: 在一个托马斯·皮凯蒂和其他经济学家正在警告日益加剧的不平等以及继承财富不断增强的力量的时代，富有的贵族家庭竟然仍然是现代民主国家的象征核心，这是奇怪的。

chunks.relation: 修饰主句，说明时代背景

chunks.english: when Thomas Piketty and other economists are warning of rising inequality and the increasing power of inherited wealth
chunks.chinese: 当托马斯·皮凯蒂和其他经济学家正在警告日益加剧的不平等以及继承财富不断增强的力量时
chunks.relation: 修饰 a time，说明时代特征

chunks.chinese: 托马斯·皮凯蒂和其他经济学家

chunks.english: rising inequality and the increasing power of inherited wealth
chunks.chinese: 日益加剧的不平等以及继承财富不断增强的力量
chunks.relation: 作 are warning of 的宾语
形式主语，真正内容由 that 从句承担
作系动词 is 后的表语

chunks.english: that wealthy aristocratic families should still be the symbolic heart of modern democratic states
chunks.chinese: 富有的贵族家庭竟然仍然是现代民主国家的象征核心
chunks.relation: 是真正主语，对应形式主语 it

chunks.english: the symbolic heart of modern democratic states
chunks.chinese: 现代民主国家的象征核心
chunks.relation: 作 should still be 后的表语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is + adj. + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 that wealthy aristocratic families should still be...。

original: The most successful monarchies strive to abandon or hide their old aristocratic ways.
translation_literal: 最成功的君主制国家努力放弃或隐藏它们旧有的贵族做派。

chunks.relation: 修饰 monarchies

chunks.english: to abandon or hide their old aristocratic ways
chunks.chinese: 放弃或隐藏它们旧有的贵族做派
chunks.relation: 不定式结构作 strive 的目标内容
修饰 ways

original: Princes and princesses have day-jobs and ride bicycles, not horses (or helicopters).
translation_literal: 王子和公主们有日常工作，并且骑自行车，而不是骑马（或乘直升机）。

chunks.relation: 作谓语 have 的宾语
与 have 并列，共同说明主语的行为
作 ride 的宾语
补充说明交通方式的对比

sentence_patterns.explanation: not horses (or helicopters) 省略了 ride，完整理解为 not ride horses or helicopters。

original: Even so, these are wealthy families who party with the international 1%, and media intrusiveness makes it increasingly difficult to maintain the right image.
translation_literal: 即便如此，这些是与国际1%富人群体聚会的富有家庭，而且媒体的侵扰性使保持正确形象变得越来越困难。

chunks.relation: 承接上文并表示让步转折
作系动词 are 后的表语

chunks.chinese: 与国际1%富人群体聚会的
chunks.relation: 修饰 wealthy families

chunks.english: and media intrusiveness makes it increasingly difficult to maintain the right image
chunks.chinese: 而且媒体的侵扰性使保持正确形象变得越来越困难
chunks.relation: 与前一分句并列
形式宾语，真正内容由不定式承担
补充说明形式宾语 it 的状态
对应形式宾语 it

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: make + it + adj. + to do sth.
sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式宾语，真正宾语是 to maintain the right image，increasingly difficult 是宾语补足语。

key_phrases.meaning: 合适的形象，正确的公众形象

original: While Europe’s monarchies will no doubt be smart enough to survive for some time to come, it is the British royals who have most to fear from the Spanish example.
translation_literal: 尽管欧洲的君主制无疑会足够聪明以在未来一段时间内存续下来，但最需要从西班牙例子中感到担忧的是英国王室成员。

chunks.english: While Europe’s monarchies will no doubt be smart enough to survive for some time to come
chunks.chinese: 尽管欧洲的君主制无疑会足够聪明以在未来一段时间内存续下来
chunks.relation: 修饰主句，表示让步
作 be 后的表语

chunks.english: to survive for some time to come
chunks.chinese: 以在未来一段时间内存续下来
chunks.relation: 补充说明 smart enough 的结果

chunks.english: it is the British royals who
chunks.relation: 强调句结构，强调主语
被强调的主语
作谓语 have 的宾语
说明担忧的来源

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is/was + 被强调部分 + who + 其他部分
sentence_patterns.explanation: it is the British royals who... 强调 the British royals，表示最需要担忧的是英国王室成员。

original: It is only the Queen who has preserved the monarchy’s reputation with her rather ordinary (if well-heeled) granny style.
translation_literal: 正是女王凭借她相当普通的（虽然富裕的）祖母式风格维护了君主制的声誉。

chunks.english: It is only the Queen who
chunks.relation: 强调句结构，强调主语
被强调的主语
作谓语 has preserved 的宾语

chunks.english: with her rather ordinary (if well-heeled) granny style
chunks.chinese: 凭借她相当普通的（虽然富裕的）祖母式风格
chunks.relation: 说明维护声誉的方式
补充修饰 granny style

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is/was + 被强调部分 + who + 其他部分
sentence_patterns.explanation: It is only the Queen who... 强调 only the Queen。
if well-heeled 省略了 she is，表示“虽然富裕”。

key_phrases.meaning: 祖母式风格，亲切朴素的老奶奶风格

original: The danger will come with Charles, who has both an expensive taste of lifestyle and a pretty hierarchical view of the world.
translation_literal: 危险将随着查尔斯而来，他既有昂贵的生活品味，又有一种相当等级化的世界观。

chunks.relation: 说明危险到来的伴随对象

chunks.english: who has both an expensive taste of lifestyle and a pretty hierarchical view of the world
chunks.chinese: 他既有昂贵的生活品味，又有一种相当等级化的世界观
chunks.relation: 补充说明 Charles 的特点

chunks.english: both an expensive taste of lifestyle and a pretty hierarchical view of the world
chunks.chinese: 昂贵的生活品味以及相当等级化的世界观
chunks.relation: 作 has 的宾语
修饰 taste
修饰 view

original: He has failed to understand that monarchies have largely survived because they provide a service — as non-controversial and non-political heads of state.
translation_literal: 他未能理解，君主制之所以大体上存续下来，是因为它们提供了一种服务，即作为无争议且非政治性的国家元首。

chunks.english: that monarchies have largely survived because they provide a service
chunks.chinese: 君主制之所以大体上存续下来，是因为它们提供了一种服务
chunks.relation: 作 understand 的宾语

chunks.chinese: 因为它们提供了一种服务
chunks.relation: 说明君主制存续下来的原因

chunks.english: as non-controversial and non-political heads of state
chunks.chinese: 作为无争议且非政治性的国家元首
chunks.relation: 补充说明 service 的具体内容
修饰 heads of state

sentence_patterns.explanation: 破折号后的 as non-controversial and non-political heads of state 解释 a service 的具体内容。

original: Charles ought to know that as English history shows, it is kings, not republicans, who are the monarchy’s worst enemies.
translation_literal: 查尔斯应该知道，正如英国历史所表明的那样，正是国王，而不是共和主义者，才是君主制最坏的敌人。

chunks.english: that as English history shows, it is kings, not republicans, who are the monarchy’s worst enemies
chunks.chinese: 正如英国历史所表明的那样，正是国王，而不是共和主义者，才是君主制最坏的敌人
chunks.relation: 作 know 的宾语

chunks.chinese: 正如英国历史所表明的那样
chunks.relation: 补充说明判断的历史依据

chunks.english: it is kings, not republicans, who
chunks.chinese: 正是国王，而不是共和主义者
chunks.relation: 强调句结构，强调主语

chunks.chinese: 国王，而不是共和主义者
chunks.relation: 被强调的主语
作系动词 are 后的表语

sentence_patterns.explanation: as English history shows 是插入式 as 结构，表示“正如英国历史所表明的那样”。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is/was + 被强调部分 + who + 其他部分
sentence_patterns.explanation: it is kings, not republicans, who... 强调 kings, not republicans。

key_words.meaning: 共和主义者，共和派人士

key_phrases.meaning: 正如英国历史所表明的那样
最坏的敌人，最大的敌人
